features.name: Baseline Static Water Map
features.description: Vite + React + TypeScript + Leaflet app with bilingual UI, static local JSON data, dashboard, station map, and data table.
features.evidence: Verified before harness creation: npm run convert:data converted 1764 records across 126 periods; npm test passed; npm run build passed; GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build passed.

features.name: GitHub Pages Deployment
features.description: Deploy workflow builds with Node 22, npm ci, npm test, production build, Pages artifact upload, and deploy-pages action. App URLs respect the /taipei-feitsui-water-map/ base path.
features.evidence: Added .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml and verified npm test, npm run build, and GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build.

features.name: Agent Harness
features.description: Maintain lightweight restartable agent instructions, feature state, progress log, verification script, and session handoff.
features.evidence: Harness files created and tailored on 2026-06-16. validate-harness scored 100/100. ./init.sh passed: npm ci, npm run convert:data (1764 records across 126 periods), npm test, npm run build, and GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build. npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities.

features.name: Verified Station Coordinates
features.description: Populate public/data/station-locations.json with source-backed verified coordinates for physical sampling stations, keeping summary rows unmapped.
features.evidence: Current station-locations.json intentionally keeps coordinates missing; stations are shown in the unmapped list.

features.name: Performance Split
features.description: Reduce the current Vite chunk-size warning by code-splitting heavy map/chart code without changing data behavior.
features.evidence: Current build succeeds but warns that the main JS chunk exceeds 500 kB after minification.

features.name: Code Review Fixes
features.description: Review and fix correctness, maintainability, and runtime-resilience findings in the app and data scripts.
features.evidence: Fixed trend charts so they aggregate monthly values instead of connecting unrelated station rows; added safe localStorage access; added visible data-load errors; improved Chinese/English search terms; made data fetch refresh continue across per-resource failures. ./init.sh passed and npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities.

features.name: AI Slop Cleanup
features.description: Regression-tests-first cleanup pass for duplicated utility logic, unused exports, fetcher failure handling, and missing behavior tests.
features.evidence: Added node:test regression coverage for value parsing, ROC date parsing, filtering, summary counts, and station comparison. Deleted unused utility exports/types, deduplicated latest-station-count and dashboard chart/card rendering, and made all-failed resource refreshes fail after writing diagnostics. ./init.sh passed with 5 unit tests; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities; harness validation remained 100/100.

features.name: Hydrometeorological Context
features.description: Add Taipei Feitsui hydrometeorological monthly report fetching, conversion, static JSON outputs, hydromet tab, combined dashboard, and monitoring data table modes while preserving the water-quality map as the main product.
features.evidence: Fetched known hydromet resource 27adec48-2a1e-4897-a285-86a01e6c15ff and converted 31 daily records across 1 period with 0 issues. Added hydromet parser/aggregation tests; npm test passed with 10 tests. ./init.sh passed, npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities, and browser smoke verified Chinese/English tabs, hydromet charts/cards, non-causation combined dashboard notice, and 31-row hydromet daily table.

features.name: Hydromet Review Fixes
features.description: Code-review follow-up for the hydromet UI, including missing daily filters and removal of unused legacy table code.
features.evidence: Removed the obsolete WaterQualityTable component and unused table prop surface. Added hydromet weekday/weekend and date-range filters shared by charts and the data table. Browser smoke verified weekend range 2026-01-10 through 2026-01-18 returns exactly 4 rows with no console errors. ./init.sh passed; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities; harness validation remained 100/100.

features.name: Reservoir Operation Context
features.description: Add Taipei Feitsui reservoir operation monthly report fetching, conversion, static JSON outputs, operation tab, combined reservoir context dashboard, and operation table modes.
features.evidence: Fetched or reused 130 operation resources and converted 3961 daily operation records across 130 periods. Added operation models/utilities/tests, operation tab/cards/charts, combined dashboard join, table modes, translations, service-worker cache entries, and README documentation. npm test passed with 14 tests and npm run build passed with the existing chunk-size warning.

features.name: Taipei River Water Quality
features.description: Add a separate Taipei citywide river-water module with Big5 CSV conversion, qualifier-aware summaries, filters, charts, records table, and optional verified station markers.
features.evidence: Converted four ROC-year 112–115 Big5 CSV files into 768 records across 9 rivers, 16 stations, and 48 year-month periods. Added ND</---/scientific-notation parsing, summaries, combined dashboard summary, isolated bilingual river tab, filters, selector-driven charts, sortable table, optional verified coordinate file, PWA cache entries, and documentation. Plain ./init.sh passed with 16 tests plus local and Pages builds; browser smoke verified 768 rows, 2026 新店溪 filtering to 12 rows, ND raw display, English labels, mobile containment, and 0 console errors; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities.

features.name: Taipei Pumping Stations
features.description: Add static Taipei Hydraulic Engineering Office pumping-station records with TWD97 conversion, maps, filters, summaries, nearby lookup, and interpretation limits.
features.evidence: Converted 88 UTF-8-SIG records using EPSG:3826 TWD97-TM2(zone121) to WGS84; all coordinates are valid. Added a bilingual map, filters, nearby lookup, summaries, directory, PWA cache entries, and conversion regression tests. ./init.sh and Pages build passed on 2026-06-26.

features.name: Taipei Water Support to Taiwan Water Statistics
features.description: Add Taipei Water Department support-to-Taiwan-Water monthly statistics with annual CSV fetch, daily-row monthly aggregation, summaries, charts, filters, table, and interpretation limits.
features.evidence: Fetched 11 official Big5 annual CSV resources (ROC 104-114), aggregated daily MM月DD日 rows into 127 monthly records, preserved raw 水量 units, and added support-to-TWC records, summary, annual summary, conversion report, bilingual tab, filters, charts, table, no-coordinate notice, PWA cache entries, README notes, and parser regression tests.
